model.analytics.stg_customers.name: stg_customers
model.analytics.stg_customers.raw_code: select id, name, region, segment from erp.customers where active = true
model.analytics.stg_customers.compiled_code: select id, name, region, segment from warehouse.erp_customers where active = true

model.analytics.int_invoice_lines.name: int_invoice_lines
model.analytics.int_invoice_lines.raw_code: select * from {{ ref('stg_invoices') }} i join {{ ref('stg_line_items') }} l on i.id = l.invoice_id
model.analytics.int_invoice_lines.compiled_code: select * from warehouse.stg_invoices i join warehouse.stg_line_items l on i.id = l.invoice_id

model.analytics.int_region_rollup.name: int_region_rollup
model.analytics.int_region_rollup.raw_code: select region, sum(amount) as total from {{ ref('int_customer_revenue') }} group by region
model.analytics.int_region_rollup.compiled_code: select region, sum(amount) as total from warehouse.int_customer_revenue group by region

model.analytics.fct_invoices.name: fct_invoices
model.analytics.fct_invoices.raw_code: select * from ( select * from ( select * from ( select * from {{ ref('int_invoice_lines') }} ) x ) y ) z
model.analytics.fct_invoices.compiled_code: select * from ( select * from ( select * from ( select * from warehouse.int_invoice_lines ) x ) y ) z

model.analytics.rpt_revenue_by_region.name: rpt_revenue_by_region
model.analytics.rpt_revenue_by_region.raw_code: select r.region, r.total, f.invoice_count from {{ ref('int_region_rollup') }} r left join ( select region, count(*) as invoice_count from {{ ref('fct_invoices') }} group by region ) f on r.region = f.region
model.analytics.rpt_revenue_by_region.compiled_code: select r.region, r.total, f.invoice_count from warehouse.int_region_rollup r left join ( select region, count(*) as invoice_count from warehouse.fct_invoices group by region ) f on r.region = f.region

model.analytics.rpt_exec_dashboard.name: rpt_exec_dashboard
model.analytics.rpt_exec_dashboard.raw_code: select * from {{ ref('rpt_revenue_by_region') }} cross join {{ ref('dim_customer') }}
model.analytics.rpt_exec_dashboard.compiled_code: select * from warehouse.rpt_revenue_by_region cross join warehouse.dim_customer
